| Context | Skill |
| ------- | ----- |
| Auth host, scopes, token, permisos | gh-auth |
| Issues, labels, triage y cierre | gh-issue |
| Authoring, publish y editar pull requests | gh-pr |
| Review, approve y request changes | gh-review |
| Runs, checks, logs y artifacts | gh-actions |
| Tags, release notes y assets | gh-release |
